name: ChkCreate_J1939AddressClaimViolation, ChkStart_J1939AddressClaimViolation
title: ChkCreate_J1939AddressClaimViolation, ChkStart_J1939AddressClaimViolation
syntax: dword ChkCreate_J1939AddressClaimViolation (Node aNode, dword aAddress, dword aac, dword ig, dword sys, dword sysi, dword fct, dword fcti, dword ecui, dword mc, dword in, dword aTimeout, dword aFlags, char[] callback1);

dword ChkStart_J1939AddressClaimViolation (Node aNode, dword aAddress, dword aac, dword ig, dword sys, dword sysi, dword fct, dword fcti, dword ecui, dword mc, dword in, dword aTimeout, dword aFlags, char[] callback1);
description: Observes the Address Claiming of a J1939 node. The specified node must respond to a Request for Address Claim.
Optionally the check allows sending other messages, only if an Address Claim message (0xEE00) of the node is received first.
You can add further nodes to this check with Chk_AddNode.

parameters.name: aNode
parameters.description: Name of the node to be checked. Must exist in database.

parameters.name: aAddress
parameters.description: Address of the node.0-253 or -1 (or 0xFFFFFFFF) if value of the node in database is used.

parameters.name: aac
parameters.description: Arbitrary Address Capable0..1 or -1 (or 0xFFFFFFFF) if value of the node in database is used.

parameters.name: ig
parameters.description: Industry Group0..7 or -1 (or 0xFFFFFFFF) if value of the node in database is used.

parameters.name: sys
parameters.description: Vehicle System0..127 or -1 (or 0xFFFFFFFF) if value of database is used.

parameters.name: sysi
parameters.description: Vehicle System Instance0..15 or -1 (0xFFFFFFFF) if value of the node in database is used.

parameters.name: fct
parameters.description: Function0..255 or -1 (or 0xFFFFFFFF) if value of the node in database is used.

parameters.name: fcti
parameters.description: Function Instance0..31 or -1 (or 0xFFFFFFFF) if value of the node in database is used.

parameters.name: ecui
parameters.description: ECU Instance0..7 or -1 (or 0xFFFFFFFF) if value of the node in database is used.

parameters.name: mc
parameters.description: Manufacturer Code 0..2047 or -1 (or 0xFFFFFFFF) if value of the node in database is used.

parameters.name: in
parameters.description: Identity Number0.. 2097151 or -1 (or 0xFFFFFFFF) if value of the node in database is used.

parameters.name: aTimeout
parameters.description: Within this time a Request for Address Claim has to be responded.Default unit [ms], if not changed with ChkConfig_SetPrecision.

parameters.name: aFlags
parameters.description: Bit 0: Allow address usage before Address Claim. Bit 1: Allow Address Claim messages from non-configured nodes. Bit 2: Allow claiming of other address than configured.

parameters.name: callback1
parameters.description: This parameter is optional. Name of the callback which is called when the check fails.Signature: void Callback( dword checkId )

parameters.name: callback2
parameters.description: This parameter is optional. Name of the callback which is called when the check fails.Signature: void Callback( TestCheck check )

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
